node.text:
For lethal purposes only.

Inspired by his bond with the Valley, the Nike Book 2 ‘The Phoenix’ reignites Book’s pursuit to rise up with calculated precision.

Available in select markets tomorrow.

For professionals like Devin Booker, they need a shoe that ensures every job is handled with elite execution. 

The Nike Book 2 is available now.

node.text:
Royalty is the standard in the city that birthed a King. 

Four teams showed up to Chosen 1’s Akron, ready to prove who’s worthy of the crown. In the end, @stvmbbk and @stvmgbk sat on the throne.

node.text:
Believe you belong.

From his NBA debut in 2003, @kingjames knew that he had to put in the work to reach greatness.

The LeBron XXIII ‘Grand Opening’ celebrates his commitment since day one. Available now.

For the throne, making history is light work.

The LeBron XXIII “The Chosen One and The 1 Who Chose”celebrates the legendary moment where @kingjames and @bronny first graced the court together.

Available now.

Now haunting a court near you. 

The KD18 ‘Slim Reaper’ just dropped globally.

MVP’s and back-to back Larry O’B’s.

The journey, immortalized. 

The LeBron XXIII ‘Miami Twice’ is available now.

The LeBron XXIII ‘Miami Twice’ celebrates back-to-back glory in South Beach.

Arriving on nike.com 10.9.
